news.t: Harrison Street Asset Management Launches Active Global Listed Infrastructure ETF

holdings.infoBox: NFRX is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Union Pacific stock at 5.03%, National Grid at 4.89%, The Williams Companies at 4.66%, CenterPoint Energy at 4.33%, and Atmos Energy at 4.18%.

overview.description: The Harrison Street Infrastructure Active ETF (NFRX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, targeting the infrastructure sector of the global equity market in seeking long-term capital appreciation and income. The fund combines fundamental analysis with macroeconomic factors in the selection process. NFRX was launched on Jan 28, 2026 and is issued by Harrison Street.

data.title: Harrison Street Asset Management Launches Active Global Listed Infrastructure ETF
data.text: CHICAGO, Jan. 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Harrison Street Asset Management (“HSAM”), a leading global alternative investment management firm with more than $108 billion in assets under management, an...
